title: LEGAL PROCEDURE OF PROPERTY OF HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS
author: Raimov, Elbek
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article presents the legal status of the property of higher education organizations and issues of storage and management of this property. Legal frameworks regulating property rights in higher education institutions and the legal status of the legal nature of intellectual property have been researched.
steps_raw: This article presents the legal status of the property of higher education organizations and issues of storage and management of this property. Legal frameworks regulating property rights in higher education institutions and the legal status of the legal nature of intellectual property have been researched.
